description: Sequence Viewer mouse and keyboard bindings. modifier values: None | Ctrl | Shift | Alt | Ctrl+Shift

drag_select.description: Left drag selects a column range and replaces guide lines

drag_select_additive.description: Ctrl + Left drag adds a new range without clearing existing guide lines

guide_set.description: Left click sets a single guide line and clears the others

guide_toggle.description: Ctrl + Left click toggles a guide line

zoom.description: Ctrl + Mouse wheel zooms in or out

row_multi_select.description: Ctrl + Left click toggles row selection

row_range_select.description: Shift + Left click selects a row range from the anchor

multi_select.description: Ctrl + Left click toggles annotation selection

edit.description: Double left click opens annotation editing

zoom_to_range.description: Left drag zooms to the selected NT range

scroll_to.description: Left click scrolls the clicked NT position into view

select_all.description: Left click selects the consensus row

select_all_additive.description: Ctrl + Left click toggles the consensus row alongside existing selection

edit_label.description: Double left click edits the consensus label
